local_kinds._note: added for the entrance listing claims (title, tagline, link): a stipulation about this deployment's own name and location, adopted not evidenced, exactly as the-registry's contract-bundle kind is. Recorded here for documentation; corpora/tables.js was hand-synced to match rather than regenerated, since re-running scaffolder/new-kernel.mjs against this kernel's config would overwrite kernel/governance/corpora/knowledge-game-data.js's own 20 hand-grounded claims with an empty skeleton.

_note_adopted: declaration (ceiling constitutive) and forum (ceiling corroborated) are shared common kinds (vendor/corpora/_shared/common-types.js), adopted for the front-page decomposition claims (fp.*): definitional statements and interpretive weighings respectively, hand-synced into corpora/tables.js for the same reason as local_kinds above.

sources.description: knowledge-game-spec-v2.md (this deployment's own specification, Sections 2, 5, and 9) and kernel/governance/stage-0.md, the asserting source for every governance claim this kernel carries about the app's own behavior
this deployment's own stipulated identity (name, tagline, and canonical locations): adopted by the operator, not measured, the same honest floor a constitutive-ceiling kind's own claim ever carries
this deployment's own front page (index.html): the submission's argument, restated as the definitional and app-behavior claims the page itself stipulates or already grounds elsewhere in this kernel

the epistack submission repository's own docs and corpora, cited by the front page's own doors; these claims enter at the honest floor a citation alone ever earns, awaiting a local fork that would type them
